forecast-period.text: Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h turning northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain. The chance of a thunderstorm about the southern Fleurieu Peninsula in the late morning. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 16.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h turning southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 15.
Cloudy. High chance of rain. Winds northerly 20 to 25 km/h.
Cloudy. Very high chance of rain. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h turning northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the south in the morning. Winds northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h turning southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning then decreasing to 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Cloudy. Very high chance of rain. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain. The chance of a thunderstorm in the west in the morning. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely from the late morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h turning northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds north to northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h tending west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 16.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h turning south to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h turning northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely from the late morning. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Cloudy. Very high chance of rain. Winds northerly 20 to 25 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h turning northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 1 [Low]
Cloudy. Very high chance of rain. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h shifting southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Cloudy. High chance of showers in the west, medium chance elsewhere. Light winds.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h turning northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the late afternoon and evening. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers near the eastern border, high chance elsewhere. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h turning northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning westerly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h turning northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely from the late morning. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 20 to 25 km/h turning westerly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h turning northeasterly in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending north to northwesterly 20 to 25 km/h during the afternoon and evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 16.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h turning westerly during the morning then decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 16.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 24.
Sun protection 12:10pm to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h turning north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 23.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 16.

Cloudy. High chance of showers west of the ranges, medium chance elsewhere. Winds northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h turning west to southwesterly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 16.
Cloudy. Very high chance of rain. The chance of a thunderstorm. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 21.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of rain east of Ceduna, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h tending northwest to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning then becoming northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm near the coast in the afternoon. Winds northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h turning west to southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm near the coast. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h turning southwesterly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Cloudy. Medium chance of rain. Winds northerly 20 to 25 km/h.
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h turning northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Mostly sunny morning. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h turning southwesterly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Cloudy. Very high chance of rain. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h turning northwesterly in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning and afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h turning westerly 20 to 30 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h turning southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning then decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers in the far west, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm west of Coober Pedy. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm. Winds northwest to northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching 21 to 27.
Sun protection 11:00am to 2:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of rain east of Coober Pedy, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the early morning. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending west to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h before dawn. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 21.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds west to northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h tending west to southwesterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers south of Coober Pedy, slight chance elsewhere. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h turning southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning then decreasing to 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 17.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower about the Gammon Ranges, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers south of Yunta, most likely in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds north to northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching 22 to 29.
Sun protection 11:00am to 1:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of rain west of Leigh Creek, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm west of Leigh Creek in the morning and afternoon. Winds north to northeasterly 30 to 45 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 18 with daytime temperatures reaching 22 to 29.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers east of Leigh Creek, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm north of Leigh Creek in the evening. Winds west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers south of Yunta, slight chance elsewhere. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending west to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning then decreasing to 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.
